####  October 29, 2024 
#  Xponential Fitness Brands Expand to Mexico and Japan
Xponential Fitness partners with experienced master franchisees to drive international growth.
SAN DIEGO, CA / ACCESSWIRE / October 29, 2024 / Xponential Fitness, a global franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, continues expanding internationally. The company recently announced plans to bring three of its popular fitness concepts, Pure Barre, Club Pilates, and Rumble Boxing, to Mexico and Japan, respectively. These moves mark important milestones for both brands and highlight Xponential's strategy of supporting established franchisees who have already launched several locations.
Read the full article [here](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/xponential-fitness-brands-expand-mexico-141500786.html).
